intro: Successful hedges combine knowledge of climate, soil, plant species, and proper planting timing. Free, fast, and accurate. Values updated for 2026.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **plants = meters ÷ spacing**. Simply enter your linear distance and select your plant species. Get instant results for thuja, privet, or bamboo hedges.

fields.label: Linear Meters
fields.help: Total length of the hedge line in meters.

explanation:
## How to Calculate Hedge Plants

Creating a beautiful, full hedge requires understanding plant spacing. Different species mature to different widths, which determines the spacing needed between individual plants.

This calculator uses a simple formula: divide the total linear distance by the spacing for your chosen plant species. The result tells you exactly how many plants to purchase.

## Plant Species Guide

**Thuja**: Matures to ~0.8m width. Choose this for taller, denser hedges with fine texture. Suitable for most climates.

**Privet**: Matures to ~0.4m width. Space more closely for a dense look. Requires regular pruning (every 6 months) to maintain shape.

**Bamboo**: Matures to ~1m width. Use wider spacing between plants. Fast-growing but can spread aggressively—consider installing root barriers.

## Important Notes

This is an estimate based on standard spacing for landscape design. Results are for reference only. For larger projects or if you're unsure, consult with a professional landscaper. Data updated for 2026.

faq.q: How many plants do I need for a hedge?
faq.a: Enter your total linear meters and select your plant type. This calculator will tell you exactly how many plants to buy based on ideal spacing.

faq.q: What spacing should I use between hedge plants?
faq.a: Thuja: 0.8m apart. Privet: 0.4m apart (for density). Bamboo: 1m apart. Spacing depends on your desired fullness and the mature width of the plant.

faq.q: When should I plant a hedge?
faq.a: Autumn or spring are ideal. Avoid planting during extreme summer heat. Fall planting allows roots to establish before spring growth.

faq.q: How tall will my hedge grow?
faq.a: Thuja: 2-4m tall. Privet: 1-3m tall. Bamboo: 3-6m tall. Final height depends on how you prune it and your local climate.

faq.q: Which species needs the least maintenance?
faq.a: Thuja requires pruning once per year. Privet needs frequent pruning (every 6 months). Bamboo is low-maintenance but can be invasive without barriers.

faq.q: How much water do hedges need?
faq.a: Water frequently the first year to establish roots. Most hedges become drought-tolerant afterward, though water needs vary by species and climate.

faq.q: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, completely free. No registration or account needed. All our calculators are free and available to everyone.
Results are estimates based on standard landscape spacing formulas. For professional projects, consult a certified landscaper. We review calculations regularly for accuracy.
No. All calculations run in your browser. We don't store or send your data to any server.
